title: Simple Wireless Redstone
description: Make redstone easier by making it wireless.
body:
![Simple Wireless Redstone Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9635665f2f9881b732507bc087cd7370bc8f8775_0.webp) --- ### SWR — Simple Wireless Redstone **SWR** is a lightweight mod that adds **wireless redstone** in a simple and intuitive way. It is designed to be easy to use and minimal, relying on only **two items and one block** while avoiding unnecessary complexity. ---
### What SWR Adds **Transmitter** - Accepts a redstone input - Sends the signal wirelessly to linked receivers **Receiver** - Receives wireless redstone signals - Outputs the signal as standard redstone **Linker (Item)** - Used to connect transmitters and receivers - Makes linking quick and straightforward
---
### How to Use SWR 1. Place a **Transmitter** and one or more **Receivers**. 2. Hold the **Linker**. 3. Right-click the transmitter, then right-click the receiver to link them. Once linked, the wireless redstone connection is active.
--- ### Tips and Advanced Linking **Linking one transmitter to multiple receivers** * Shift + right-click a transmitter to select it * Shift + right-click any number of receivers to link them **Unselecting a transmitter** * Shift + right-click in the air * (Shift +) right-click a different transmitter * Right-click any transmitter or receiver normally --- ### Crafting Recipes | ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31978c228260fa93fb3468eef84d0f823cdbd997.png) | ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/031b3bfd7c17a8fa8e2307e4248e11cfb484f7b1.png) | ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc0d406cf4bf9d40fd5dd88522b32683fc3ec53b.png) | |:--:|:--:|:--:| | **Transmitter** | **Receiver** | **Linker** |
